title: Senior Financial Analyst - PwC India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - PwC India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
PwC India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About PwC India:
PwC India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PwC India!
